title: Sun Ruonan
content:
Overview
[
]

Sun Ruonan is the little sister of 
Sun Yunshan
. She was involved in a complex situation related to the 
Cultivation Alliance
 and the control exerted by a figure known as the "Ancestor".

Initially, Sun Ruonan was bewitched by the "Ancestor" and became a member of the 
Cultivation Alliance
. After meeting her brother 
Sun Yunshan
, she tricked him into joining this organization. When 
Sun Yunshan
 realized something was wrong and tried to escape, the "Ancestor" appeared and captured the martial uncles that came with him. These uncles had their memories wiped and became puppets, and 
Sun Yunshan
 himself had a celestial seed planted in his body, restricting his freedom and placing his life under control.

Wang Lin
 later intervened in this matter. He held both 
Sun Yunshan
 and Sun Ruonan in his hands and was able to remove the green lines (the restrictions) from 
Sun Yunshan
 and saved Sun Ruonan from the "Ancestor"’s control. After this, 
Wang Lin
 released the short old man who claimed to be from the 
Celestial Realm
 and left.Sun Ruonan was among three women sitting opposite the old man in the tower within the miasma, indicating she was held captive or under observation until 
Wang Lin
’s intervention. After her rescue, she was thrown toward 
Sun Yunshan
, symbolizing her return to her brother and presumably freedom from control.

Sun Yunshan
 expressed great joy upon seeing Sun Ruonan again but also complex emotions due to the events. The removal of the restrictions was significant and was facilitated by 
Wang Lin
, who gave 
Sun Yunshan
 a jade to delay the celestial seed's effect in emergencies.This  revealed that Sun Ruonan was manipulated and used by the "Ancestor" as part of a scheme that involved controlling 
Sun Yunshan
 and his martial uncles, but thanks to 
Wang Lin
’s intervention, she was freed and reunited with her brother.
